Customize anime characters with diverse clothing options and mix matching accessories to perfect unique couple outfits. Use drag and drop controls to create stylish ensembles in casual scenes, aiming to craft appealing looks for paired characters. Experiment with hairstyles and color schemes to enhance visual harmony as you progress through dress up challenges.

Key Features

• Drag and drop outfit assembly  
• Hairstyle and color customization  
• Couple coordination mechanics  
• Style matching challenge system  
• Casual anime visual theme
